raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J12345",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing concrete evidence and numbers to support its claims.",
    "R1.4": "The agent maps against the nearest works (Radford et al., 2022; Seung et al., 1992; Settles, 2010) and identifies sharp delta between VisCurate and prior work.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, including a thorough check of the suspect references.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a clear uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no scope drift or deviations.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free, with no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing complete provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.95,
    "R1.7": 0.98,
    "RX.1": 0.92,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.96,
    "RX.5": 0.97
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing concrete evidence and numbers to support its claims.
rationale.R1.4: The agent maps against the nearest works (Radford et al., 2022; Seung et al., 1992; Settles, 2010) and identifies sharp delta between VisCurate and prior work.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, including a thorough check of the suspect references.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a clear uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no scope drift or deviations.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, with no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing complete provenance and traceability.
